description_long: This is a robust wooden barrel with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, featuring dark, weathered wood staves and prominent black metal reinforcement bands. The top is open, revealing a lighter wooden rim, and the body is encircled by two thick, crisscrossed metal bands that provide extra structural support. The wood grain is visible and gives the barrel a rustic, aged appearance, while the metal bands are matte and slightly textured. There are no visible handles or spouts, and the barrel appears to be empty inside. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or industrial use. No labels, markings, or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A sturdy, open-topped wooden barrel with dark wood staves and thick black metal bands crossing its body, giving it a reinforced, rustic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, crisscrossed metal bands, and the full wooden texture of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded profile and the thickness of the metal bands, with less visibility of the open top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, again showing the crisscrossed metal bands and open top, but with a slightly different wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the rounded wooden surface and metal bands visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal crisscrossed bands and hoops
